$comment: Release flow: `npm run release` bumps the version in BOTH package.json files (root via the npm plugin, release/app via @release-it/bumper — electron-builder and app.getVersion() read release/app), prepends the conventional-commits section to CHANGELOG.md, commits as chore(release), tags vX.Y.Z and pushes. The v* tag push then triggers .github/workflows/kiagent-core-package.yml, which verifies the tag matches release/app/package.json before building and attaches installers to a draft GitHub release.
